sentences.target: On fait une pause de cinq minutes.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ fɛ yn poz də sɛ̃k minyt/

translations.fr: On fait une pause de cinq minutes.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ fɛ yn poz də sɛ̃k minyt/
translations.es: Estamos tomando un descanso de cinco minutos.
translations.it: Facciamo una pausa di cinque minuti.
translations.pt: Estamos fazendo uma pausa de cinco minutos.
translations.he: אנחנו עושים הפסקה של חמש דקות.
translations.ar: نحن نأخذ استراحة لمدة خمس دقائق.
translations.nl: We nemen een pauze van vijf minuten.
translations.hi: हम पाँच मिनट का ब्रेक ले रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi tar en pause på fem minutter.
translations.ro: Facem o pauză de cinci minute.
translations.da: Vi tager en pause på fem minutter.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun used impersonally or colloquially for 'we'; controls 3rd person singular agreement on the verb.
Finite main verb in present 3rd person singular; here idiomatically 'faire une pause' = to take a break.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the count noun 'pause'.
Common feminine noun serving as the direct object of 'fait'.
Preposition introducing a measure complement ('de cinq minutes') specifying duration.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'minutes' within the measure phrase.
Common feminine noun, plural; complement of 'de' indicating the length of the break.

sentences.target: Je profite de la pause pour appeler maman.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁɔfit də la poz puʁ aple mamɑ̃/

translations.fr: Je profite de la pause pour appeler maman.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁɔfit də la poz puʁ aple mamɑ̃/
translations.en: I’m using the break to call mom.
translations.es: Aprovecho el descanso para llamar a mamá.
translations.de: Ich nutze die Pause, um meine Mama anzurufen.
translations.it: Approfitto della pausa per chiamare la mamma.
translations.zh-Hans: 我利用休息时间给妈妈打电话。
translations.yue: 我趁休息打電話畀媽媽。
translations.ru: Я использую перерыв, чтобы позвонить маме.
translations.pt: Estou aproveitando a pausa para ligar para a minha mãe.
translations.he: אני מנצל את ההפסקה כדי להתקשר לאמא.
translations.vi: Tôi tranh thủ giờ nghỉ để gọi cho mẹ.
translations.nl: Ik gebruik de pauze om mijn moeder te bellen.
translations.uk: Я використовую перерву, щоб подзвонити мамі.
translations.hu: Kihasználom a szünetet, hogy felhívjam anyukámat.
translations.hi: मैं ब्रेक में माँ को फोन कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Wykorzystuję przerwę, żeby zadzwonić do mamy.
translations.el: Εκμεταλλεύομαι το διάλειμμα για να καλέσω τη μαμά.
translations.nb: Jeg bruker pausen til å ringe mamma.
translations.id: Saya memanfaatkan waktu istirahat untuk menelepon Ibu.
translations.sv: Jag utnyttjar pausen för att ringa mamma.
translations.ro: Profit de pauză ca să o sun pe mama.
translations.da: Jeg bruger pausen til at ringe til mor.
translations.ja: 休憩を利用して母に電話します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Finite main verb in present 1st person singular; 'profiter de' requires the preposition 'de' for its complement.
Preposition linking 'profiter' to its nominal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, marking a specific 'pause'.
Common feminine noun; object of the preposition 'de'.
Subordinating conjunction introducing an infinitival clause of purpose ('pour' + infinitive).
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'pour' expressing purpose.
Common noun used familiarly; direct object of 'appeler'.

sentences.target: Vous avez une pause à seize heures.
sentences.reading: /vu ave yn poz a sɛz œʁ/

translations.fr: Vous avez une pause à seize heures.
translations.ipa: /vu ave yn poz a sɛz œʁ/
translations.en: You have a break at four p.m.
translations.es: Tienes un descanso a las cuatro de la tarde.
translations.ko: 당신은 오후 네 시에 쉬는 시간이 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在下午四点有休息时间。
translations.pt: Você tem uma pausa às quatro da tarde.
translations.he: יש לך הפסקה בארבע אחר הצהריים.
translations.vi: Bạn có giờ nghỉ lúc bốn giờ chiều.
translations.nl: Je hebt om vier uur pauze.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा ब्रेक शाम चार बजे है.
translations.id: Kamu punya waktu istirahat pukul empat sore.
translations.ja: あなたは午後4時に休憩があります。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person pronoun (plural or formal singular) serving as the subject.
Finite main verb in present 2nd person plural; expresses possession, not auxiliary here.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'pause'.
Common feminine noun; direct object of 'avez'.
Preposition marking clock time.
Cardinal numeral specifying the hour.
Common feminine noun, plural; time unit complement of 'à'.

sentences.target: Ils reprennent après la pause du déjeuner.
sentences.reading: /il ʁəpʁɛn apʁɛ la poz dy deʒœne/

translations.fr: Ils reprennent après la pause du déjeuner.
translations.ipa: /il ʁəpʁɛn apʁɛ la poz dy deʒœne/
translations.en: They start back after the lunch break.
translations.es: Retoman después de la pausa del almuerzo.
translations.de: Sie machen nach der Mittagspause weiter.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在午休后继续工作。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺午餐休息之後再開始工作。
translations.ru: Они возобновляют работу после обеденного перерыва.
translations.pt: Eles retomam depois do intervalo do almoço.
translations.he: הם חוזרים לעבוד אחרי הפסקת הצהריים.
translations.vi: Họ bắt đầu lại sau giờ nghỉ trưa.
translations.nl: Ze gaan na de lunchpauze weer verder.
translations.uk: Вони відновлюють роботу після обідньої перерви.
translations.hi: वे लंच ब्रेक के बाद फिर से शुरू करते हैं.
translations.id: Mereka mulai lagi setelah istirahat makan siang.
translations.ja: 彼らは昼休みの後に再開します。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun.
Finite main verb in present 3rd person plural; here used intransitively meaning 'to resume'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, marking 'pause'.
Common feminine noun; object of the preposition 'après'.
Contraction of 'de + le'; preposition marking a genitive/nominal complement ('du déjeuner').
Common masculine noun; complement to 'du', forming 'pause du déjeuner' (lunch break).
